text: Coagulation induces extracellular ROS production in a C5a-dependent manner that contributes to organ injury (Barrett, Hsu et al. 2018). Coagulation balance that refers to the interaction between the procoagulant pathways specific for clot formation and hose mechanisms included in the fibrinolysis system influences dysregulation of homeostasis maintenance, which lead sot oxidative stress (Robea, Balmus et al. 2023).
